title: PLugins to make order automated posted to the end list

posts.author: dari786 (REHSIN REBU)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I go through step by step method to get the order and post it to saving list and after confirming the order i have to save the details.

Is there any plugins which will help me automatically save the order details and save to the portal

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dari786!

By any chance, would you be able to elaborate a little further on your workflow/order process, so we can get a more clear understanding of what you’re hoping to achieve? Are you interested in saving order details to monday.com or to the specific portal system you’re currently using?

I look forward to learning more

Best,
Bianca
